---
title: Music Listening Habits
Subtitle: Collecting insights on my music tastes, activities, and listening habits. 
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

```

```{css}
body { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #3088a6, #c74664);font-family:'Iosevka Charon'; font-weight: bold; color:#FFFFFF;
```

## Daily Listening activity 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQKi687u6NGQCebUhqnaSbpKqItphtxi61CJC_g54YqlMkYLGNWOILLg97nXDRhWRH_28HnKi7kV8H-/pub?output=csv")

#Renaming variables
latest_data <- logged_data %>%
rename(listeninglength_min = 2,
       songs_listened = 3,
       genres = 4,
       activity = 5,
       location = 6,
       skipped_any = 7,
       songs_skipped = 8)


#Bar graph listening activity 
latest_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = activity)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#3088a6") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Activity", subtitle = "Activity while listening to music",
       x = "What activity were you doing while listening to music?", y= "Number of ocassions")


```


```{r}
#Bar graph location
latest_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = location)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#c74664") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Location", subtitle = "STATS220",
       x = "Where were you while listening to music?", y= "Number of ocassions")

```

```{r}
#Comparison graph
latest_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(y = activity, fill = skipped_any)) +
  labs(title = "Does the ammount of songs skipped depend on activity?",
       subtitle = "Comparing Activity to the number of song skips",
       caption = "Source: STATS220",
       y = "Activity",
       x = "Count")
```

```{r}
#Comparison graph IS THIS OK?
groupedlistening_data <- latest_data  %>%
  mutate(groupedlistening_length = cut(listeninglength_min,
      breaks = c(0, 30, 60, 100, Inf), 
      labels = c("0-30", "30-60", "60-100", "100+"),
      right = TRUE  ))

groupedlistening_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(y = activity, fill = groupedlistening_length)) +
  labs(title = "Does listening length depend on the activity?",
       subtitle = "Comparing Activity to listening length",
       caption = "Source: STATS220",
       y = "Activity",
       x = "Count of listening length")
```




```{r}
#Data Mean listening time
num_reports <- latest_data$listeninglength_min%>%
  length()
mean_listeninglenth <- latest_data$listeninglength_min%>%
  mean() %>%
  round(1)
paste0("Out of the ", num_reports, " completed surveys, My average listening time was ", mean_listeninglenth, " minutes.")

#Data max and min listening time 
min_listeninglenth <- latest_data$listeninglength_min%>%
  min() %>%
  round(1)
max_listeninglenth <- latest_data$listeninglength_min%>%
  max() %>% 
  round(1)
paste0("My minimum listening time was ", min_listeninglenth, " minutes, and my maximum listening time was ", max_listeninglenth, " minutes.")

```

![](https://media.tenor.com/mww1zsPtPjIAAAAM/gitapro3-gitagita.gif)
